[Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 1/27 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Saori (Swimsuit), 3★ Hiyori (Swimsuit), 3★ Neru (Bunny), 3★ Karin (Bunny)
